3333080.name: MINE
3333080.description:
Experience a suspenseful mine escape in [Mine]. Explore the deep underground by yourself and try to escape, or call salvation to the earth

There's only one life

Seek escape routes risking against the backdrop of complex tunnels, collapsed shafts, and a heart sound coming from somewhere. Open the doors, find a warehouse, and try to escape by climbing the stairs

Darkness and creeping terror

The darker and darker vision makes the player nervous.

The topography of the stone-stacked mine makes the player disorientated and interferes with escape.

Remember the terrain by fixing the flashlight with a battery.

Maybe there's a rule?

Multiple items and 2 choices

Fix the radio at the shelter, contact the ground

Go directly to the ground.

Can you find true freedom?

Stemina exists in running

Running might be a solution.

But people can't run forever

Then it wouldn't be a bad idea to find a place to hide.
3333080.supported_languages: 英语, 日语, 韩语
